title: More Frogs 2
description: Adds more frog variants to minecraft.
body:
More Frogs adds a lot of new frog variants with unique features and drops when they eat Slime/Magma Cubes. Currently It adds the following variants with their respective drops.


    


SCULK FROG




Eats Small Slime to drop Sculk Blocks.

Spawns in the Deep Dark Biome.

POISON DART FROG (Special Drop)

          


Eats Small Slime to drop Mulch (Fuel, smelts 4 items per mulch).

Spawns in the Jungle Biomes.

WARPED FROG




Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Shroomlight.

Spawns in the Warped Forest Biome in The Nether.

CRIMSON FROG




Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Shroomlight.

Spawns in the Crimson Forest Biome in The Nether.

SPIRIT FROG




Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Bone Meal.

Spawns in the Soul Sand Valley Biome in The Nether.

WOOD FROG




Eats Small Slime to drop Blue Ice.

Spawns in the Sub-Zero Land Biomes for example the Snowy Plains.

INFERNAL FROG




Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Magma Blocks.

Spawns in the Basalt Deltas Biome in the Nether.

PURPUR FROG




Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Chorus Fruit.

Spawns in the End Highlands Biome in the End.

ENDER FROG (Special Drop)

          


Eats Small Magma Cubes to drop Light At The End Blocks (Light Blocks).

Spawns in the The End Biome in the End.

DUSK AND DAWN (Special Drop)

                    


Eats Small Slime to drop Skybox (Toggleable Light Blocks).

Spawns above y 256 in the Overworld.


SKYBOX DEMONSTRATION




More variants will be added soon, report bugs on the github repo or if you have a suggestion for an addition I'll try my best to make it possible. Thanks to the MC community for inspiring some of the textures. Special thanks to Other_Goblin for the Poison Dart Frog reference.

You can override the food in
data\minecraft\tags\entity_types\frog_food.json

And you can also change the biomes they spawn in (except dusk and dawn) by overriding
data\minecraft\tags\worldgen\biome\spawns__variant_frogs.json

You can also override drops in
data\minecraft\loot_tables\entities\magma_cube.json
data\minecraft\loot_tables\entities\slime.json


Temporarily ARR while I clean up the code and ensure compatibility.
